title: thymus pulegioides var. parvifolius
intro: Thymus pulegioides var. parvifolius, also known as small-leaf thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant (Thymus pulegioides) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thymus pulegioides var. parvifolius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Thyme preparations can be made into teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
